name: Activity feed
when_to_use: 需要回答“最近发生了什么”并把多人对项目、文档、部署或审批的动作按新到旧展示时用它；若重点是阶段与里程碑，用 timeline；若需要筛选、分页或审计海量事件，用日志表。
why_valuable: 聊天中的事件列表容易丢失人物—动作—对象关系，也常把时间顺序写反；本组件按 at 自动倒序，用头像缩写、动作语句、目标强调和相对时间建立稳定的扫读节奏。

data_in.note: data.items 是事件数组，组件按可解析的 at 时间降序排列；无法解析的事件保留相对顺序并排在有效时间之后。now 是用于生成相对时间的可选 ISO 基准，省略时取渲染时刻。actor、action、target 组合为可读句子；avatar 是最多显示 3 个字符的缩写/emoji，不接受图片 URL，避免额外网络请求。

schema.title?: string —— 标题；省略时显示 “Recent activity”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题下的范围或项目说明
schema.now?: string —— 可解析的 ISO 时间，作为相对时间基准；省略时使用 Date.now()
schema.items: {actor:string,action:string,target?:string,at:string,avatar?:string,detail?:string,tone?:'neutral'|'positive'|'warning'|'negative'}[] —— 事件；at 负责倒序与相对时间，avatar 仅为缩写/emoji，tone 控制状态点
schema._relativeTime: 自动显示 just now、min/hr/day/wk/mo/yr ago 或未来的 in …；不修改原始 at

spec.note: 按事件数增高，事件区最高 620px 后内部滚动；560px 以下时间移到正文下方。无 vh/百分比高度，不依赖载体测量。

example._why: 四条同日协作事件以固定 now 产生稳定的分钟/小时相对时间，覆盖人物、动作、目标、详情、缩写与多种状态色。

minimal.title: Project Atlas activity
minimal.subtitle: Latest changes across design and engineering

items.detail: Inline error text falls below AA.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；事件倒序和相对时间只在本地计算，没有点击、筛选、表单或宿主消息。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/events/global footprint; reverse-chron render verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to answer "what happened recently?" by showing actions by multiple people on projects, documents, deployments, or approvals from newest to oldest. If the focus is phases and milestones, use timeline; if you need filtering, pagination, or auditing for a large event volume, use a log table.
en.why_valuable: Event lists in chat easily lose the person-action-object relationship and often reverse chronological order. This component automatically sorts by at in descending order and creates a stable scanning rhythm with avatar initials, action phrases, emphasized targets, and relative times.

data_in.note: data.items is an event array, sorted by parseable at timestamps in descending order. Unparseable events retain their relative order and appear after valid timestamps. now is an optional ISO baseline for relative times; when omitted, render time is used. actor, action, and target form a readable sentence. avatar is an abbreviation/emoji of up to 3 characters and does not accept image URLs, avoiding extra network requests.

schema.title?: string -- Title; shows "Recent activity" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- Scope or project description below the title
schema.now?: string -- Parseable ISO time used as the relative-time baseline; uses Date.now() when omitted
schema.items: {actor:string,action:string,target?:string,at:string,avatar?:string,detail?:string,tone?:'neutral'|'positive'|'warning'|'negative'}[] -- Events; at controls descending order and relative time, avatar is initials/emoji only, and tone controls the status dot
schema._relativeTime: Automatically displays just now, min/hr/day/wk/mo/yr ago, or future in ...; does not modify the original at

spec.note: Height grows with the event count; the event area scrolls internally above 620px. Below 560px, time moves beneath the body. No vh/percentage height and no carrier measurement dependency.
